[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [media](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVideo](../../TextmodeVideo.md) / time

# Method: time()

```ts
time(seconds): this;
```

Seek to a playback time.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `seconds` | `number` | Time in seconds. |

## Returns

`this`
